key_items: Trump family trust and major institutions (Mubadala, Winklevoss) accumulating Bitcoin and crypto stocks aggressively in Q1
Most pro-Bitcoin Federal Reserve Board composition in history signals favorable macro policy ahead
CLARITY Act advancing through Senate with crypto lobby gaining unprecedented political power despite partisan resistance
reasoning: Strong institutional accumulation by Trump family, Mubadala, and major Bitcoin firms combined with historic pro-crypto Fed leadership creates sustained bullish momentum over 1-7 days. However, macro headwinds from Treasury yield surges and whale profit-taking at resistance levels ($79-82k) create near-term consolidation pressure that prevents a stronger bullish rating.
risks: Treasury yields surging to new highs and large holders moving $700M+ BTC to exchanges for profit-taking could trigger a sharp pullback below $76,000 support if macro risk-off sentiment accelerates.
